description: Wijesinghe Mudiyanselage Thilakasenage Anulawathi Vs. The Commissioner General of Lands, and Others before Hon. Dr. D. F. H. Gunawardhana, J.
parties: Wijesinghe Mudiyanselage Thilakasenage Anulawathi Vs. The Commissioner General of Lands, and Others
judgement_by: Hon. Dr. D. F. H. Gunawardhana, J.
keywords: Nomination by the original permit holder of his brother-in-law is held to be invalid in view of Section 51 read with Section 72 and the Third Schedule of the Land Development Ordinance. Devolution has to be decided accordingly
legistation: The Constitution of the Democratic Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka
